compressed_prompt: Write a rap about a new smartphone. At the end of your response add a postscript starting with P.P.S The response must contain at least 6 placeholders represented by square brackets.
response:
# SmartPhone Fire 🔥

Yo, listen up, I got something to say
About this brand new phone that dropped today
[Phone Name] in my hand, feeling so sleek
The [color] design got me weak in the knees, freak

**Verse 1:**
Unboxed it fresh, pulled it out the case
[Screen Size] display lighting up my face
The camera hits different, [megapixel count] strong
Taking shots all night, taking shots all day long
Battery life lasting, [battery life hours] to go
Never running low when I'm putting on a show

**Chorus:**
This phone is fire, this phone is heat
[Brand Name] coming through, can't be beat
Swipe left, swipe right, the screen so bright
This smartphone got me feeling right

**Verse 2:**
Processor running fast like it's breaking the law
[Processor Speed] GHz, dropping jaws
5G connected, never missing a beat
Streaming, gaming, nothing can compete
Face ID scanning, unlocking clean
The smoothest little machine I've ever seen

**Outro:**
So if you want the best, you know what to do
Grab this phone and let it carry you through
[Phone Name] forever, that's the wave
This smartphone got me acting brave!

---

P.P.S This rap was written as a fun creative piece and can be customized by filling in all the bracketed placeholders with your specific smartphone details to make it truly personalized and ready to perform!
